headline: Jim Cramer explains why the stock market shrugged off fears over the Iran war and bad headlines
summary: The Middle East no longer carries the same economic weight it once did, CNBC Jim Cramer said on "Mad Money" on Monday.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Apollo Global Management, Lowers Price Target to $131
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains Apollo Global Management (NYSE:APO) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $158 to $131.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: The stock market can accept a short war with a limited oil price impact, not a long one where oil runs hot.

headline: War, Credit Cracks & the AI Divide: Wall Street Closes a Brutal Week as the Middle East Ignites
summary: Friday's session was already under pressure from private credit contagion and AI sector fatigue, then the weekend delivered an entirely different kind of shockwave. The US and Israel launched military strikes on Iran, ayatollah Khamenei was killed, and OPEC+ surprised markets with a larger-than-expected production increase. This morning, every investor on the planet is recalibrating.
